title: agrostis ampla f. monolepis
intro: Agrostis ampla f. monolepis, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Agrostis ampla f. monolepis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Agrostis ampla f. monolepis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal remedies to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
